# Anti-Slop Blocklist

Fonts listed here MUST NOT appear in font-hunt recommendations unless the user explicitly requests one (e.g. "we need Inter for legal reasons"). Update this list as the slop evolves.

## Tier 1 — Universal defaults (hard no)
- Inter
- Montserrat
- Poppins
- Roboto
- Open Sans
- Lato
- Raleway
- Nunito
- Source Sans Pro
- Work Sans
- Ubuntu
- Noto Sans (when used as hero — fine as CJK fallback)
- Arial
- Helvetica Neue (as generic "safe sans")

## Tier 2 — Overused serifs
- Playfair Display
- Lora
- Merriweather
- Crimson Text
- PT Serif
- Libre Baskerville

## Tier 3 — The new slop (previously "indie", now everywhere in AI output)
- DM Sans
- DM Serif Display
- Satoshi
- Clash Display
- General Sans
- Space Grotesk (when used as hero — acceptable as supporting)
- Geist (when used as hero — acceptable as supporting)
- Manrope
- Outfit
- Plus Jakarta Sans

## Reasoning

These fonts aren't bad — most are technically excellent. They're blocked because recommending them signals zero creative thought and the user can get them from any template / any AI tool. font-hunt exists to find *what else is out there*.

## Override

If a user brief explicitly names a blocklist font ("pair something with Inter"), skill skips the blocklist for that font only — but still applies the rest of the list to the proposed pair.
